summary: Regional Relations Panel testing completed successfully. Backend API returns 24 countries grouped by Neighbor(4), GCC(7), Major(3), Central Asia(3), EU(7). All required fields present: embassy_url, recent_visit, status, tag, highlights, visa. Frontend UI correctly renders accordion-style panel with fixed 400px height, no emoji flags, right-aligned status text, and proper color coding (red for negative relationships like India, green for positive like China).

minor.issue: Trade data (exports/imports/remittances) returns NULL for all countries due to SBP EasyData API daily rate limiting. This is expected per agent context and NOT a bug.

passed_tests: Backend: /api/regional returns HTTP 200
Backend: Returns exactly 24 countries
Backend: Country groupings correct - Neighbor(4), GCC(7), Major(3), Central Asia(3), EU(7)
Backend: Central Asia group contains Azerbaijan, Tajikistan, Kazakhstan
Backend: Major group contains Russia
Backend: All 24 countries have required fields (embassy_url, recent_visit, status, tag, highlights, visa)
Backend: India status contains TENSE/SUSPENDED
Backend: China status contains STRATEGIC PARTNERSHIP
Backend: Azerbaijan has all details (embassy, recent_visit, highlights, visa)
Backend: Embassy URLs use mofa.gov.pk format (18+ countries)
Backend: No emoji flags in response
Backend: Visa structure has status and notes fields
Frontend: Regional Panel loads with 'Regional Relations' title
Frontend: All 5 group labels visible (Neighbor, GCC, Major, Central Asia, EU)
Frontend: 24 country rows rendered
Frontend: All countries start collapsed (no detail panels visible initially)
Frontend: India expands with red/negative status styling
Frontend: India shows Embassy link, Recent Visit, Highlights, Visa sections
Frontend: Clicking China collapses India (accordion behavior)
Frontend: China shows green/positive status styling
Frontend: Azerbaijan expands with all details (Embassy, Recent Visit, Highlights, Visa)
Frontend: Panel has fixed height of 400px
Frontend: No emoji flags in country names
Frontend: Status text is right-aligned
context_for_next_testing_agent: Regional Relations Panel is fully functional with 24 countries. Backend returns all required fields. Frontend correctly implements accordion behavior, fixed panel height, no emoji flags, right-aligned status text, and proper color coding for relationship status. Trade data is NULL due to SBP API rate limiting (expected, not a bug).

regional_api.trade_data_status: NULL due to SBP API rate limiting (expected)
